Speakers.Speaker: Returning to the Furthest Explored Floor

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}One-way teleporters are found throughout the Abyss of Time, and can be used to instantly return to the Desert of Doors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 46}Even after returning to the Desert of Doors, you can speak to Fuuka by the entrance to return to your {f 0 1 2}furthest explored floor{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Heading back could be a good idea if you find yourself stuck.[n]{f 1 1}
